mapper.select: SELECT id, datasource_id, datasource_name, db_type, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, driver_class, pool_min_size, pool_max_size, pool_timeout_ms, query_timeout_sec, default_schema, connection_props, is_active, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_datasource WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, datasource_id, datasource_name, db_type, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, driver_class, pool_min_size, pool_max_size, pool_timeout_ms, query_timeout_sec, default_schema, connection_props, is_active, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_datasource WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_datasource (datasource_id, datasource_name, db_type, jdbc_url, db_username, db_password, driver_class, pool_min_size, pool_max_size, pool_timeout_ms, query_timeout_sec, default_schema, connection_props, is_active, description, created_by) VALUES (#{datasourceId}, #{datasourceName}, #{dbType}, #{jdbcUrl}, #{dbUsername}, #{dbPassword}, #{driverClass}, #{poolMinSize}, #{poolMaxSize}, #{poolTimeoutMs}, #{queryTimeoutSec}, #{defaultSchema}, #{connectionProps}, #{isActive}, #{description}, #{createdBy})
